scripts.build: npm run build:workout && npm run build:monitor && npm run build:settings
scripts.build:workout: tsc --outFile build/workout-app.js typescript-workout/*.ts && terser build/workout-app.js -o build/workout-app.min.js -c -m
scripts.build:monitor: tsc --outFile build/monitor-app.js typescript-monitor/*.ts && terser build/monitor-app.js -o build/monitor-app.min.js -c -m
scripts.build:settings: tsc --outFile build/settings-app.js typescript-settings/*.ts && terser build/settings-app.js -o build/settings-app.min.js -c -m
